case_title: MARK LEW VS. GL+A CIVIL ENGINEERS, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF LEW, MARK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEW, MARK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GL+A CIVIL ENGINEERS, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP MASLOFF, RALPH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS A GENERAL PARTNER OF GL+ A CIVIL  ENGINEERS, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP TOLENTIN, MELCHOR INDIVIDUALLY AND AS A GENERAL PARTNER OF GL+ A CIVIL  ENGINEERS, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP GANDHI, JAYANT INDIVIDUALLY AND AS A GENERAL PARTNER OF GL+ A CIVIL  ENGINEERS, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP ROSS, JAMES INDIVIDUALLY AND AS A GENERAL PARTNER OF GL+ A CIVIL  ENGINEERS, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP $29,397.74 PRINCIPAL, $686.40 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $30,084.14, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
